title: BC extra-provincial company compliance obligation pack
description: Draft operational schedules for federal or foreign corporations registered extra-provincially in British Columbia.

rules.title: BC extra-provincial annual report
rules.summary: Track the BC extra-provincial registration annual report or registry maintenance due date.

authority.displayCitation: BC Business Corporations Act and registry annual report workflow

checklist: Review the BC extra-provincial registration profile.
Confirm attorney/agent, registered office or mailing details, and corporation status.
Prepare the annual report or maintenance filing packet.
File through BC Registries or the approved service path.
Archive confirmation, receipt, and profile-report evidence.

rules.caveat: Draft operational cadence for registration tracking; confirm current BC corporate registry instructions for the entity and registration type.

rules.title: BC extra-provincial profile evidence review
rules.summary: Track annual evidence review for BC extra-provincial registration details.

authority.displayCitation: BC Business Corporations Act records and registry evidence workflow

checklist: Request or capture a dated registry profile/report where available.
Confirm registration number, assumed name, local representative, addresses, and current status.
Link the review to the organization registration record.

rules.caveat: Use as an evidence-control reminder; legal filing duties can differ by corporation type and registry status.
